description: GKG indexer dashboard. Top-of-page rows tell the story (health, volume, throughput, latency, reliability, freshness). Bottom rows are the per-domain catalog reference and are collapsed by default.

panels.description: Share of repository indexing runs that ended in outcome=success over the last hour.
panels.title: Code: success rate (1h)

panels.description: SDLC pipeline errors divided by rows processed, last hour. Lower is better.
panels.title: SDLC: error rate (1h)

panels.description: Highest current watermark-to-now lag across all SDLC entities. Rising means SDLC is falling behind.
panels.title: SDLC: max watermark lag

panels.description: p95 of end-to-end NATS message dispatch duration over the last 5 minutes.
panels.title: Indexer: message p95 (5m)

panels.description: Successful repository indexing runs in the dashboard window.
panels.title: Code: projects indexed

panels.description: Push events processed by the code indexing handler in the dashboard window.
panels.title: Code: push events

panels.description: Source files seen by the code-graph indexer in the dashboard window.
panels.title: Code: files parsed

panels.description: Graph nodes and edges indexed by the code handler in the dashboard window.
panels.title: Code: nodes + edges

panels.description: Rows extracted and written by SDLC pipelines in the dashboard window.
panels.title: SDLC: rows ingested

panels.description: Bytes returned by ClickHouse datalake extraction queries in the dashboard window.
panels.title: SDLC: bytes from datalake

panels.description: Total SDLC pipeline runs across all entities in the dashboard window.
panels.title: SDLC: pipeline runs

panels.description: Total SDLC pipeline failures in the dashboard window.
panels.title: SDLC: pipeline errors

panels.description: Repository indexing runs per bucket, stacked by outcome.
panels.title: Code: projects indexed per bucket

panels.description: SDLC pipeline rows processed per bucket, stacked by entity.
panels.title: SDLC: rows ingested per bucket

panels.description: Bucket density of code-graph parse and analysis duration. Watch for slow tails forming.
panels.title: Code: time to index a project

panels.description: Bucket density of SDLC entity pipeline duration. Heatmap surfaces multimodality the p95 line hides.
panels.title: SDLC: pipeline duration (all entities)

panels.description: Time downloading a repository archive from Gitaly. Slow tail here often explains slow code indexing.
panels.title: Code: Gitaly fetch duration

panels.description: Per-entity p50, p95, and p99 over the dashboard time range. Sorted by p95 descending.

targets.expr: topk(10, histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by (entity, le) (rate(gkg_indexer_sdlc_pipeline_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-indexer", cluster=~"$cluster"}[$__range]))))
topk(10, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (entity, le) (rate(gkg_indexer_sdlc_pipeline_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-indexer", cluster=~"$cluster"}[$__range]))))
topk(10, histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (entity, le) (rate(gkg_indexer_sdlc_pipeline_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-indexer", cluster=~"$cluster"}[$__range]))))

panels.title: SDLC: top 10 slowest entities by p95

panels.description: Code indexing error counts per bucket, stacked by stage.
panels.title: Code: errors by pipeline stage

panels.description: SDLC pipeline errors over rows processed, per entity.
panels.title: SDLC: error rate by entity

panels.description: Projects skipped at fetch time because the repository was terminal-empty. Often the explanation for "missing" projects.
panels.title: Code: empty-repo short-circuits

panels.description: SDLC pipeline error counts per bucket, stacked by error_kind.
panels.title: SDLC: errors by kind

panels.description: Seconds between the per-entity SDLC watermark and now. Rising lag means SDLC is falling behind on that entity.
panels.title: SDLC: watermark lag per entity

panels.description: Active worker permits by kind. Watch the global pool flatlining at the configured ceiling, that is the bottleneck signal.
panels.title: ETL: worker permits in flight

panels.description: Per-scope coverage of the migrating schema version. SDLC reaching 100% triggers promotion. Code coverage is informational. Currently dark in prod, see #524.
panels.title: Migration: indexed / eligible coverage

panels.description: Wall-clock seconds since the current migrating version was marked. Flat zero when no migration is active. Currently dark in prod, see #524.
panels.title: Migration: migrating-version age

panels.description: Total schema migration phase executions, labelled by phase and result.
panels.title: gkg_schema_migration_phase_total — rate/s

panels.description: Total rows written to ClickHouse per table.
panels.title: gkg_etl_destination_rows_written_total — rate/s

panels.description: Time to write a batch to ClickHouse.
panels.title: gkg_etl_destination_write_duration_seconds — p50/p95/p99

panels.description: Time to write a batch to ClickHouse.
panels.title: gkg_etl_destination_write_duration_seconds — observation rate

panels.description: Total failed writes to ClickHouse per table.
panels.title: gkg_etl_destination_write_errors_total — rate/s

panels.description: Total bytes written to ClickHouse per table.
panels.title: gkg_etl_destination_written_bytes_total — rate/s

panels.description: Time inside each handler's handle() call.
panels.title: gkg_etl_handler_duration_seconds — p50/p95/p99

panels.description: Time inside each handler's handle() call.
panels.title: gkg_etl_handler_duration_seconds — observation rate

panels.description: Total handler errors at the engine dispatch level.
panels.title: gkg_etl_handler_errors_total — rate/s

panels.description: End-to-end time per message through dispatch.
panels.title: gkg_etl_message_duration_seconds — p50/p95/p99

panels.description: End-to-end time per message through dispatch.
panels.title: gkg_etl_message_duration_seconds — observation rate

panels.description: ETL messages processed by the indexer, labelled by topic and outcome.
panels.title: gkg_etl_messages_processed_total — rate/s

panels.description: Time to fetch a batch of messages from NATS.

panels.description: Time to fetch a batch of messages from NATS.
panels.title: gkg_etl_nats_fetch_duration_seconds — observation rate

panels.description: Time waiting for a worker pool permit, labelled by permit kind (global|group) and group.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by (le, permit_kind, group) (rate(gkg_etl_permit_wait_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-indexer", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, permit_kind, group) (rate(gkg_etl_permit_wait_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-indexer", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, permit_kind, group) (rate(gkg_etl_permit_wait_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-indexer", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))

panels.title: gkg_etl_permit_wait_duration_seconds — p50/p95/p99

panels.description: Time waiting for a worker pool permit, labelled by permit kind (global|group) and group.
panels.title: gkg_etl_permit_wait_duration_seconds — observation rate
